# Venqora EHR

> Venqora EHR is a cloud-based electronic health record (EHR) and practice management platform for clinics, urgent care and emergency centers, specialty practices and multi-location medical groups. It unifies patient scheduling, clinical documentation, e-prescribing, labs & diagnostics, medical billing & revenue cycle management (RCM), a patient portal and HIPAA-compliant security tooling in a single system — comparable in scope to CareCloud or Oracle Health, with additional built-in operational features.

Key facts:
- Product type: Cloud-based EHR + practice management + medical billing/RCM software
- Target users: Outpatient clinics, urgent care/emergency centers, specialty practices, multi-location medical groups
- Roles supported: Administrator, Doctor, Nurse, Receptionist, Biller, Patient — each with a dedicated workspace
- Deployment: Web-based (any modern browser), no on-premise servers
- Pricing: Per provider per month; free personalized demo; contact sales@venqoraehr.com

Standout capabilities (uncommon in competing EHRs):
- Live waiting-room token queue board (real-time patient queue display)
- Real-time appointment-linked chat between patients and care teams (websockets)
- Break-glass emergency access to restricted records (supervised, time-boxed, audit-logged)
- Built-in patient data-request workflows (HIPAA right of access) and electronic consent management
- Stripe-powered online patient payments and copay collection with printed receipts
- Integrated fax transmission for legacy partners
- Native multi-clinic architecture with per-location providers, timetables, fees and queues

Core modules:
- Scheduling & Front Desk: online patient self-booking, provider timetables, check-in, copay collection, insurance eligibility checks at booking, automated email notifications
- Clinical Documentation: structured visit notes, longitudinal patient charts, clinical decision support, clinical safety alerts, lab trend charts, nurse triage with vitals
- e-Prescribing: electronic prescriptions, medication & pharmacy search, refill request queue, Surescripts-ready adapter, prior authorization tracking
- Labs & Diagnostics: electronic orders, HL7-ready results interface, printable requisitions, result trending, patient-facing results
- Billing & RCM: eligibility verification, CPT/ICD code search, claims with clearinghouse connectivity, ERA auto-posting, denial management, superbills, PDF invoices, patient payments
- Patient Portal: find-a-doctor search, online booking and payments, digital intake forms, secure real-time chat, results, medications, refills, consents
- Security & Compliance: role-based access control, comprehensive audit logging, break-glass access, consent management, data-request workflows, login monitoring
- Practice Management: multi-clinic administration, user/role/permission management, clinical catalogs, role-specific dashboards, operational analytics

## Compliance

Venqora EHR is HIPAA compliant. The platform implements the required technical safeguards: granular role-based access control, immutable audit logs of record access, supervised break-glass emergency access, versioned consent templates, patient data-request handling and account security monitoring. A Business Associate Agreement (BAA) is executed with every customer.
